response.justification: The candidate is an experienced and versatile software engineer, but the profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. Hands-on C++ is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (2014–2015) plus a university thesis, far short of the required 5–10 years of strong C++ on Windows. The core expertise is in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web/mobile/desktop systems. There is no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience, and SQL exposure is light (mostly MongoDB/MySQL). The fundamentals are solid, but the specific stack and domain are absent.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Strong testing/TDD, CI/CD, and DevOps discipline
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and in a thesis project
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months) and dated, not the required 5–10 years
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
Weak SQL Server/Oracle and Windows-platform alignment
